project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) with React frontend and Express/PostgreSQL backend
test_framework: No dedicated test framework found; validation via build
build_command: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
test_command: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
verification_instructions: Run frontend and backend builds. Both should compile without TypeScript errors.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && npm install; cd ../backend && npm install
environment_constraints: Open internet - can install packages. Backend uses multer for file uploads (images only by default). AI service uses Anthropic SDK but ANTHROPIC_API_KEY may not be set.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns.
key_patterns: Frontend: React hooks in src/hooks/index.ts using TanStack Query. API service in src/services/api.ts with axios. Pages in src/pages/. Backend: Controllers in src/controllers/. Routes in src/routes/index.ts. Database queries use raw pg via models/db.ts query() function. Multer middleware in src/middleware/upload.ts for file uploads. AI operations go through src/services/ai.service.ts runAiOperation().
directory_structure: frontend/src/pages/ - page components; frontend/src/hooks/ - TanStack Query hooks; frontend/src/services/ - API client; backend/src/controllers/ - Express controllers; backend/src/routes/ - route definitions; backend/src/services/ - services like AI; backend/src/middleware/ - auth, upload; backend/migrations/ - SQL migrations
